text:

From-To: open->feedback

hi 

seems u forgot the patch, 

===> Checking shared library dependencies ===>  Deinstalling for 
irc/cgiirc ===>   Deinstalling cgiirc-0.5.10 pkg_delete: unable to 
completely remove directory '/tmp/cgiirc-0.5.10/www/cgiirc/interfaces' 
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list 
is incorrectly specified?) ===> Extra files and directories check 
www/cgiirc/interfaces/nonjs.pm.orig 

and it fails please check and send a patch
